criteria.text: Menu opens by clicking the burger icon
Menu opens with a smooth animation
Burger icon transforms into a close icon when the menu is open
Menu closes when clicking the close icon, the overlay area outside the menu, or any navigation link inside it
Page behind the menu does not scroll while the menu is open
Slider displays the correct number of cards per breakpoint: 3 / 2 / 1
Slider has working left and right arrow controls
After a switch, the next group contains no pet from the previously visible group
All pets within the next group are unique
Order of cards in the next group is random within the above rules
Card switching is animated (slide)
During the slide animation, additional arrow clicks are ignored; animations do not stack
Block contains 48 cards: 6 pages x 8 on desktop, 8 x 6 on tablet, 16 x 3 on mobile
The 48 cards are built from pets.json so that all pets appear an equal number of times
No two adjacent cards (in linear order) show the same pet
Pagination controls present: first, previous, current page indicator, next, last
Disabled controls (e.g. previous on page 1) are visually inactive and do not respond to clicks
Page switching is animated
Clicking a pet card opens a popup with that pet's details from pets.json
Popup has a darkened backdrop covering the page and closes on the close button or backdrop click
Page behind the popup does not scroll while the popup is open
Frameworks or libraries are used (jQuery, React, Vue, Bootstrap, Swiper, etc.)
TypeScript is used
Pet data is hardcoded in HTML or JS instead of being loaded from pets.json
